model.name: gpt-4o-mini
model.selection_rationale: Lowest available cost per token at time of selection with chat completion API support, deterministic output at temperature=0, and context window >= 4000 tokens.

tokenizer.name: o200k_base
tokenizer.note: Correct tokenizer for gpt-4o-mini. cl100k_base (GPT-4/3.5) was used in error during initial chunking and corrected before Week 3.

experiment.corpus_modification: nasfaa_2025_national_profile.pdf.txt removed from active corpus before experiment. Moved to corpus/excluded/. Caused systematic retrieval failures during S-category audit due to broad statistical content dominating results. Chunk count dropped from 1709 to 1641.
